UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user of the KrishiAI platform, primarily a farmer. This entity stores profile information, not authentication credentials.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

name.description: The full name of the farmer/user.

email.description: The primary email address for communication.

phone.description: The primary phone number for communication and WhatsApp alerts.

languagePreference.description: The preferred language for the application UI and content (e.g., 'Hindi', 'English', 'Marathi').

notificationPreferences.description: An array of preferred notification channels (e.g., 'WhatsApp', 'SMS', 'App').

subscriptionPlan.description: The user's current subscription plan (e.g., 'Free', 'Farmer Pro', 'FPO/Cooperative').

farmIds.description: References to Farm entities owned by this user. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Farm)

connectedIntegrations.description: An array of names of external integrations connected by the user (e.g., 'PMFBY', 'eNAM', 'Aadhaar').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was last updated.

Farm.title: Farm
Farm.description: Represents a specific agricultural land plot or farming operation managed by a user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Farm entity.

ownerId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who owns this farm. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Farm)

locationDistrict.description: The district where the farm is located.

locationState.description: The state where the farm is located.

latitude.description: Geographical latitude of the farm's approximate center.

longitude.description: Geographical longitude of the farm's approximate center.

acreage.description: The total land size of the farm in acres.

primaryCropIds.description: References to the primary Crop entities grown on this farm. (Relationship: Farm N:N Crop)

soilType.description: The type of soil prevalent on the farm (e.g., 'Black', 'Alluvial', 'Red').

irrigationType.description: The primary irrigation method used on the farm (e.g., 'Rainfed', 'Well', 'Canal').

healthScore.description: An overall health score (0-100) for the farm, derived from AI analysis.

carbonCreditsEarned.description: Total carbon credits (tonnes CO₂) earned by this farm.

seasonPnl.description: Projected or actual Profit & Loss for the current/last season in INR.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the farm record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the farm record was last updated.

Crop.title: Crop
Crop.description: Defines a type of agricultural crop (e.g., Cotton, Wheat, Tomato).

id.description: Unique identifier for the Crop entity.

name.description: The common name of the crop (e.g., 'Cotton', 'Rice').

botanicalName.description: The botanical or scientific name of the crop.

description.description: A brief description of the crop.

averageYieldRangeMin.description: Minimum average yield for this crop (e.g., in quintals/acre).

averageYieldRangeMax.description: Maximum average yield for this crop (e.g., in quintals/acre).

yieldUnit.description: The unit of measure for yield (e.g., 'quintals/acre').

commonDiseaseIds.description: References to Disease entities commonly affecting this crop. (Relationship: Crop N:N Disease)

Disease.title: Disease
Disease.description: Information about a specific crop disease, used for detection and recommendations.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Disease entity.

name.description: The common name of the disease (e.g., 'Late Blight').

affectedCropIds.description: References to Crop entities that this disease commonly affects. (Relationship: Disease N:N Crop)

symptomsEnglish.description: Description of disease symptoms in English.

symptomsVernacular.description: Description of disease symptoms in vernacular language (Hindi).

recommendedTreatmentEnglish.description: General treatment recommendations for the disease in English.

recommendedTreatmentVernacular.description: General treatment recommendations for the disease in vernacular language (Hindi).

preventionMeasuresEnglish.description: Preventive measures against the disease in English.

preventionMeasuresVernacular.description: Preventive measures against the disease in vernacular language (Hindi).

DiseaseScan.title: DiseaseScan
DiseaseScan.description: A record of a crop disease detection scan performed by a farmer using the AI tool.

id.description: Unique identifier for the DiseaseScan entity.

farmId.description: Reference to the Farm where the scan was performed. (Relationship: Farm 1:N DiseaseScan)

cropId.description: Reference to the Crop type that was scanned. (Relationship: Crop 1:N DiseaseScan)

scanDate.description: The date and time when the crop photo was scanned.

imageUrl.description: URL to the uploaded crop photo image.

detectedDiseaseId.description: Reference to the Disease entity identified by the AI. (Relationship: Disease 1:N DiseaseScan)

confidenceScore.description: The AI's confidence score (0-100) for the detected disease.

severity.description: The assessed severity of the disease (e.g., 'Mild', 'Moderate', 'Severe').

affectedAreaPercentage.description: Estimated percentage of the crop area affected by the disease.

treatmentRecommendationEnglish.description: Specific treatment recommendation generated by AI for this scan in English.

treatmentRecommendationVernacular.description: Specific treatment recommendation generated by AI for this scan in vernacular language (Hindi).

agroDealerLocatorInfo.description: JSON string or text providing information about nearby agro-dealers, if available.

YieldPrediction.title: YieldPrediction
YieldPrediction.description: A record of a crop yield prediction generated by the AI for a specific farm and crop.

id.description: Unique identifier for the YieldPrediction entity.

farmId.description: Reference to the Farm for which the prediction was made. (Relationship: Farm 1:N YieldPrediction)

cropId.description: Reference to the Crop type for which the prediction was made. (Relationship: Crop 1:N YieldPrediction)

predictionDate.description: The date and time when the yield prediction was generated.

sowingDate.description: The sowing date provided as input for the prediction.

predictedYieldMin.description: The minimum predicted yield in the specified unit.

predictedYieldMax.description: The maximum predicted yield in the specified unit.

yieldUnit.description: The unit of measure for the predicted yield (e.g., 'quintals/acre').

advisoryRecommendationEnglish.description: AI-generated advisory actions to improve yield in English.

advisoryRecommendationVernacular.description: AI-generated advisory actions to improve yield in vernacular language (Hindi).

districtAverageYield.description: Average yield for the same crop in the district for comparison.

stateAverageYield.description: Average yield for the same crop in the state for comparison.

historicalYields.description: An array of historical yield data for this crop on this farm, including season, year, and yield.

CarbonCreditTransaction.title: CarbonCreditTransaction
CarbonCreditTransaction.description: Records details of carbon credits earned, sold, or pending verification for a farm.

id.description: Unique identifier for the CarbonCreditTransaction entity.

farmId.description: Reference to the Farm associated with this transaction. (Relationship: Farm 1:N CarbonCreditTransaction)

type.description: The type of carbon credit transaction (e.g., 'earned', 'sold', 'pending_verification').

tonnesCO2.description: The amount of CO₂ sequestered or transacted in tonnes.

transactionDate.description: The date of the transaction or earning event.

pricePerTonneUSD.description: Price per tonne of CO₂ in USD at the time of transaction, if applicable.

pricePerTonneINR.description: Price per tonne of CO₂ in INR at the time of transaction, if applicable.

buyerName.description: Name of the corporate buyer if credits were sold.

verificationStatus.description: Current status in the verification timeline (e.g., 'Data collected', 'Satellite verified', 'Credit issued', 'Sold').

payoutAmountINR.description: The total payout amount received in INR for sold credits.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the transaction record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the transaction record was last updated.

Commodity.title: Commodity
Commodity.description: Defines an agricultural commodity for market intelligence.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Commodity entity.

name.description: The common name of the commodity (e.g., 'Wheat', 'Rice', 'Cotton').

description.description: A brief description of the commodity.

unit.description: The standard unit of measure for this commodity (e.g., 'quintal', 'kg').

msp.description: The Minimum Support Price (MSP) for this commodity in INR per unit.

Mandi.title: Mandi
Mandi.description: Information about a local agricultural market (mandi).

id.description: Unique identifier for the Mandi entity.

locationDistrict.description: The district where the mandi is located.

locationState.description: The state where the mandi is located.

MandiCommodityPrice.title: MandiCommodityPrice
MandiCommodityPrice.description: Records the price of a specific commodity at a particular mandi at a given time.

id.description: Unique identifier for the MandiCommodityPrice entity.

mandiId.description: Reference to the Mandi where the price was recorded. (Relationship: Mandi 1:N MandiCommodityPrice)

commodityId.description: Reference to the Commodity whose price is being recorded. (Relationship: Commodity 1:N MandiCommodityPrice)

price.description: The current price of the commodity at this mandi in INR per unit.

trend7Day.description: The percentage change in price over the last 7 days.

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp when this price record was last updated.

bestTimeToSellPrediction.description: AI prediction on the optimal time to sell this commodity, if applicable.

Alert.title: Alert
Alert.description: Represents a notification or advisory sent to a farmer or an FPO.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Alert entity.

recipientUserId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who is the direct recipient of this alert. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Alert)

farmId.description: Reference to the Farm this alert is related to, if applicable. (Relationship: Farm 1:N Alert)

fpoId.description: Reference to the FPO this alert is related to, if applicable. (Relationship: FPO 1:N Alert)

type.description: The category of the alert (e.g., 'disease warning', 'weather alert', 'market price change', 'general advisory').

messageVernacular.description: The alert message in vernacular language (Hindi/regional).

severity.description: The severity level of the alert (e.g., 'Info', 'Warning', 'Critical').

alertDate.description: The date and time when the alert was issued.

isRead.description: Indicates if the alert has been read by the recipient.

FPO.title: FPO
FPO.description: Represents a Farmer Producer Organization or Cooperative using the B2B portal.

id.description: Unique identifier for the FPO entity.

name.description: The name of the Farmer Producer Organization.

locationDistrict.description: The primary district of operation for the FPO.

locationState.description: The primary state of operation for the FPO.

contactPhone.description: Contact phone number for the FPO.

totalLandUnderManagement.description: Aggregate land size managed by all member farmers in acres.

aggregateYield.description: Average yield across all member farms.

totalCarbonCredits.description: Total carbon credits sequestered by all member farms.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the FPO record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the FPO record was last updated.

FPOMember.title: FPOMember
FPOMember.description: Associates a UserProfile (farmer) with an FPO, indicating their membership.

id.description: Unique identifier for the FPOMember entity.

fpoId.description: Reference to the FPO this member belongs to. (Relationship: FPO 1:N FPOMember)

farmerId.description: Reference to the UserProfile representing the farmer member. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N FPOMember)

role.description: The role of the farmer within the FPO (e.g., 'member', 'admin', 'coordinator').

joinedDate.description: The date when the farmer joined the FPO.

lastActive.description: Timestamp of the farmer's last activity within the FPO context.

definition.description: Stores individual user profile data. Each document's ID corresponds to the Firebase Authentication UID of the user. This path enforces private data access, accessible only by the user matching `userId`.

Stores details for each farm owned by a specific user. This follows hierarchical path-based ownership. The document includes the `ownerId` field (matching `userId`) which serves as a denormalized authorization field for security rules, ensuring Authorization Independence. Access is restricted to the farm's owner.

Records AI-powered disease detection scans for a specific farm. This path maintains hierarchical ownership. The document includes a denormalized `ownerId` (the `UserProfile` ID of the farm owner) from the parent farm for Authorization Independence, allowing direct rule checks without `get()` operations. Access is restricted to the farm's owner.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who owns the farm.

params.name: farmId
params.description: The unique ID of the farm where the scan was performed.

params.name: diseaseScanId
params.description: The unique ID of the disease scan record.

definition.description: Stores AI-generated yield predictions for a specific farm. This path maintains hierarchical ownership. The document includes a denormalized `ownerId` (the `UserProfile` ID of the farm owner) from the parent farm for Authorization Independence, allowing direct rule checks without `get()` operations. Access is restricted to the farm's owner.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who owns the farm.

params.name: farmId
params.description: The unique ID of the farm for which the prediction was made.

params.name: yieldPredictionId
params.description: The unique ID of the yield prediction record.

definition.description: Records carbon credit transactions for a specific farm. This path maintains hierarchical ownership. The document includes a denormalized `ownerId` (the `UserProfile` ID of the farm owner) from the parent farm for Authorization Independence, allowing direct rule checks without `get()` operations. Access is restricted to the farm's owner.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who owns the farm.

params.name: farmId
params.description: The unique ID of the farm associated with this transaction.

params.name: transactionId
params.description: The unique ID of the carbon credit transaction.

definition.description: Stores personalized alerts and notifications for a user. The `recipientUserId` field in the document (matching `userId`) serves as the denormalized authorization field, ensuring Authorization Independence. Access is restricted to the `recipientUserId`.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who is the recipient of the alert.

params.name: alertId
params.description: The unique ID of the alert record.

definition.description: Global collection defining various agricultural crop types. This data is public and read-only for all authenticated users. Write access is restricted to application administrators (via separate roles).

params.name: cropId
params.description: The unique ID of the crop type.

definition.description: Global collection providing information on crop diseases. This data is public and read-only for all authenticated users. Write access is restricted to application administrators.

params.name: diseaseId
params.description: The unique ID of the disease.

definition.description: Global collection defining agricultural commodities for market intelligence. This data is public and read-only for all authenticated users. Write access is restricted to application administrators.

params.name: commodityId
params.description: The unique ID of the commodity.

definition.description: Global collection providing information about agricultural markets (mandis). This data is public and read-only for all authenticated users. Write access is restricted to application administrators.

params.name: mandiId
params.description: The unique ID of the mandi.

definition.description: Global collection storing price records for commodities at various mandis. This data is public and read-only for all authenticated users. Write access is restricted to application administrators. Includes `mandiId` and `commodityId` for context.

params.name: mandiCommodityPriceId
params.description: The unique ID of the mandi commodity price record.

definition.description: Represents a Farmer Producer Organization. Documents must include a denormalized `members` map (e.g., `members: { 'uid1': 'admin', 'uid2': 'member' }`) for direct access control to FPO data by its designated administrators and members, ensuring Authorization Independence. `list` operations are secure using queries on this map.

params.name: fpoId
params.description: The unique ID of the Farmer Producer Organization.

definition.description: Associates a UserProfile (farmer) with an FPO. The `farmerId` in the path corresponds to the `UserProfile.id` of the member. Documents must include a denormalized `fpoMembers` map (or similar) from the parent `FPO` document, particularly roles like `admin`, to facilitate authorization for managing FPO members without requiring a `get()` call to the parent FPO, upholding Authorization Independence. Access is typically for the member themselves or FPO admins.

params.name: fpoId
params.description: The unique ID of the FPO this member belongs to.

params.name: farmerId
params.description: The unique ID of the farmer (UserProfile) who is a member of the FPO. This is also the document ID.

definition.description: A dedicated collection for managing global application administrator roles using the DBAC (Database Access Control) pattern. The existence of a document at this path signifies that the `userId` has admin privileges. This ensures Authorization Independence by allowing simple `exists()` checks in security rules for global write access to public collections (e.g., `crops`, `diseases`).

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who holds the admin role.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore data structure for KrishiAI is designed with a strong emphasis on Authorization Independence, Structural Segregation, and consistent Access Modeling to ensure robust security rules and efficient querying. 

**Authorization Independence (CRITICAL):** This is achieved by systematically denormalizing authorization-relevant fields into every document that requires access control. For instance, all user-owned subcollections like `/users/{userId}/farms/{farmId}`, `/users/{userId}/farms/{farmId}/diseaseScans/{diseaseScanId}`, `/users/{userId}/farms/{farmId}/yieldPredictions/{yieldPredictionId}`, and `/users/{userId}/farms/{farmId}/carbonCreditTransactions/{transactionId}` will contain an `ownerId` field. This `ownerId` directly corresponds to the `userId` in the path, allowing security rules to validate `request.auth.uid == resource.data.ownerId` without performing expensive and non-atomic `get()` operations on parent documents. Similarly, for collaborative data like FPOs, the `FPO` document itself includes a `members` map, and each `FPOMember` document within an FPO subcollection will also denormalize relevant FPO membership/admin roles (e.g., `fpoMembers` map) from its parent `FPO` document. This allows membership and role checks for `FPOMember` documents without a `get()` to the parent FPO.

**QAPs (Rules are not Filters):** The structure facilitates secure `list` operations primarily through path-based ownership and denormalized fields. 
1. **User-Owned Data:** For private user data, the hierarchical paths (`/users/{userId}/...`) naturally scope list operations to the authenticated user's ID, ensuring that a user can only list their own farms, scans, predictions, transactions, and alerts. This inherently supports `list` with `where('ownerId', '==', request.auth.uid)` or simply `read` rules at the path level `match /users/{userId=request.auth.uid}/...`. 
2. **Collaborative Data (FPOs):** The `FPO` collection documents contain a `members` map. A user can securely list FPOs they belong to by querying `where('members.' + request.auth.uid, '!=', null)`. For listing `FPOMember` documents within an FPO, the denormalized `fpoMembers` map in each `FPOMember` document allows rules to verify if the requesting user is an authorized FPO member or admin, thus supporting QAP-compliant `list` operations on subcollections.
3. **Global Reference Data:** Collections like `crops`, `diseases`, `commodities`, `mandis`, and `mandiCommodityPrices` are designed as top-level collections with a homogeneous security posture (read-only for all authenticated users, writeable by specific 'admin' roles). This allows all authenticated users to `list` these public reference data without security concerns, adhering to the QAP principle.

**Structural Segregation:** Each collection maintains a homogeneous security posture. For example, `UserProfile` documents are strictly private to the user, while `Crop` documents are global and read-only. This avoids complex conditional logic in security rules and makes the intent clear and debuggable.

**Access Modeling:** Path-based ownership (`/users/{userId}/...`) is consistently used for private user data. Collaborative data (FPOs) leverage a membership map for granular role-based access. Global read-only data (e.g., `crops`) are in separate top-level collections. Admin roles are managed via an existence-over-content pattern in a dedicated `/app_roles/admin/{userId}` collection.
